violations.description: Each scenario maps number + ensures thread + seeds voicemail, which increases runtime for larger story suites.
violations.suggestion: Introduce worker-scoped reusable baseline fixture with per-test overlay when safe.
violations.code_snippet: export const bootstrapStoryE4 = async ({ request, numberMappingLabel }) => { ... }

violations.description: Most tests perform immediate full thread-detail fetches; this is valuable but can be selectively reduced in some non-read-contract checks.
violations.suggestion: Keep full detail assertions for key AC checks and use narrower follow-up checks for purely replay-idempotency paths.
violations.code_snippet: const detailResponse = await apiRequest(request, { method: 'GET', path: `${seeded.context.paths.threads}/${seeded.threadId}` });

violations.description: Entrypoint-level splitting is good, but selective run tags at test level could further optimize story-focused CI selection.
violations.suggestion: Add consistent tags/grep hints for shard-optimized selective runs where applicable.

performance_metrics.avg_test_duration_estimate: Not executed in this review (static analysis)
slow_tests: Potential runtime concentration in repeated seed/bootstrap paths

recommendations: Consider worker-scoped seeded baseline fixture for E4 API suites
Reduce full thread-detail reads in non-contract-critical replay checks
summary: Performance is good and parallel-friendly, with moderate optimization headroom in repeated setup and readback patterns.
